results.title: Find All Unique/Non-Repeating Elements
results.description: Write a program to find all elements that appear exactly once (non-repeating) in an array.
results.code:
# Static input array
arr = [10, 5, 33, 5, 11, 10, 6]

# Dictionary to store frequency
freq = {}

# Count frequency of each element
for num in arr:
    freq[num] = freq.get(num, 0) + 1

# Find and print elements that appear exactly once
result = [num for num in arr if freq[num] == 1]

print(*result, sep=", ")
aiReasons: Code pasted entirely — near-zero keystrokes for 298 characters of changes
